properties.name: tfs.copies
properties.description: 文件副本数量，用于数据冗余存储

properties.name: tfs.web-entrypoint
properties.description: TFS Web 服务入口地址

properties.name: tfs.root-path
properties.description: TFS 根目录路径，存储所有文件数据

properties.name: tfs.ffmpeg-url
properties.description: FFmpeg 可执行文件路径，用于音视频转码

properties.name: etcd.endpoints
properties.description: Etcd 集群端点地址，用于配置管理和服务发现

properties.name: meili-search.master-key
properties.description: Meilisearch 主密钥，用于 API 认证

properties.name: meili-search.web-ui
properties.description: Meilisearch Web UI 访问地址

properties.name: sso.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 SSO 单点登录

properties.name: sso.info-url
properties.description: SSO 用户信息查询接口地址

properties.name: sso.cookie-name
properties.description: SSO 会话 Cookie 名称

properties.name: s3.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 S3 兼容对象存储

properties.name: s3.access-key
properties.description: S3 访问密钥（Access Key ID）

properties.name: s3.region
properties.description: S3 存储区域，默认 us-east-1
